creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: bapt
Date: Tue May  6 07:29:10 2014
New Revision: 353074
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/353074
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r353074/

Log:
  Update to 1.4.2
  Use USES=libtool
  Strip binaries
  
  PR:		ports/188757
  Submitted by:	RyoTa SimaMoto <liangtai.s16@gmail.com> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/audio/libsidplayfp/Makefile
  head/audio/libsidplayfp/distinfo
  head/audio/libsidplayfp/pkg-plist

Modified: head/audio/libsidplayfp/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/audio/libsidplayfp/Makefile	Tue May  6 07:05:27 2014	(r353073)
+++ head/audio/libsidplayfp/Makefile	Tue May  6 07:29:10 2014	(r353074)
@@ -1,15 +1,26 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	libsidplayfp
-PORTVERSION=	1.3.0
+PORTVERSION=	1.4.2
 CATEGORIES=	audio
 MASTER_SITES=	SF/sidplay-residfp/libsidplayfp/${PORTVERSION:R}
 
 MAINTAINER=	liangtai.s16@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Library to play Commodore 64 music derived from libsidplay2
 
-USES=		pathfix pkgconfig gmake
+LICENSE=	GPLv2
+
+USES=		gmake libtool pathfix pkgconfig
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
 USE_LDCONFIG=	yes
+INSTALL_TARGET=	install-strip
+
+SIDPLAYFP_SHLIB_VER=	3.0.11
+STILVIEW_SHLIB_VER=	0.0.1
+PLIST_SUB+=	\
+		SIDPLAYFP_SHLIB_MVER=${SIDPLAYFP_SHLIB_VER:C/\.[[:digit:].]+//} \
+		SIDPLAYFP_SHLIB_VER=${SIDPLAYFP_SHLIB_VER} \
+		STILVIEW_SHLIB_MVER=${STILVIEW_SHLIB_VER:C/\.[[:digit:].]+//} \
+		STILVIEW_SHLIB_VER=${STILVIEW_SHLIB_VER}
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/audio/libsidplayfp/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/audio/libsidplayfp/distinfo	Tue May  6 07:05:27 2014	(r353073)
+++ head/audio/libsidplayfp/distinfo	Tue May  6 07:29:10 2014	(r353074)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (libsidplayfp-1.3.0.tar.gz) = ed900e3b79b1d798d87d0d452830b4cd04c0053168855f52fe7cec4288bda4bd
-SIZE (libsidplayfp-1.3.0.tar.gz) = 636630
+SHA256 (libsidplayfp-1.4.2.tar.gz) = a37e427ff607fc49635cf8d7371e4eb64cbf875bd67a0c28d10497dffb31214f
+SIZE (libsidplayfp-1.4.2.tar.gz) = 637367

Modified: head/audio/libsidplayfp/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/audio/libsidplayfp/pkg-plist	Tue May  6 07:05:27 2014	(r353073)
+++ head/audio/libsidplayfp/pkg-plist	Tue May  6 07:29:10 2014	(r353074)
@@ -13,13 +13,13 @@ include/sidplayfp/sidversion.h
 include/stilview/stil.h
 include/stilview/stildefs.h
 lib/libsidplayfp.a
-lib/libsidplayfp.la
 lib/libsidplayfp.so
-lib/libsidplayfp.so.3
+lib/libsidplayfp.so.%%SIDPLAYFP_SHLIB_MVER%%
+lib/libsidplayfp.so.%%SIDPLAYFP_SHLIB_VER%%
 lib/libstilview.a
-lib/libstilview.la
 lib/libstilview.so
-lib/libstilview.so.0
+lib/libstilview.so.%%STILVIEW_SHLIB_MVER%%
+lib/libstilview.so.%%STILVIEW_SHLIB_VER%%
 libdata/pkgconfig/libsidplayfp.pc
 libdata/pkgconfig/libstilview.pc
 @dirrmtry include/sidplayfp/builders
